programme.title: S3E16 Capture & Conquer
programme.desc: GoPro Captures the best content in the world!

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.desc: A wealthy Easterner inherits a Western ranch and goes undercover as a cowboy to investigate a corrupt foreman who is plotting to seize the property for himself

programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Montana territory to investigate a wave of violent stagecoach robberies. He soon discovers that the crimes are being orchestrated by the local sheriff himself, forcing Clark into a dangerous showdown to expose Henry Plummer as the leader of the ruthless outlaws he was sworn to catch

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E3 Frank and Jesse James
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark pursues the infamous James brothers across Missouri as they escalate their daring train robberies. Clark must outmaneuver the brothers' loyal network of supporters and navigate the public’s complicated perception of the outlaws to finally bring an end to their criminal spree

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E5 Quantrill and His Raiders
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Kansas-Missouri border to track down William Quantrill and his ruthless band of Confederate guerrillas. As the territory is gripped by the violence of the Civil War, Clark must infiltrate the group's inner circle to anticipate their next raid and stop the notorious leader before he can strike again

programme.title: Tulsa 1949
programme.desc: Set against the roaring Oklahoma oil boom of the 1920s, Stuart Heisler’s drama follows Cherokee Lansing, a rancher’s daughter driven by vengeance after her father’s death at the hands of ruthless oilmen. With the help of Native American Jim Redbird and rugged roustabout Brad Brady, Cherokee plunges headfirst into the high-stakes world of oil drilling—where ambition, betrayal, and desire fuel every move.

programme.title: The Range Busters 1940
programme.desc: Three cowboy heroes ride onto the screen in The Range Busters, the film that launched the legendary series! When murder and treachery strike on a sprawling ranch, Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune team up to unmask the killers and restore justice. With quick-draw action, saddle humor, and even Alibi’s ventriloquist dummy ‘Elmer’ along for the ride, this lively Western delivers thrills, laughs, and plenty of frontier spirit.
